title: Universal Ore XP
description: Configurable mod that adds XP drops to every ore.
body:
![Universal Ore XP Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a109c6358520f1d95df6b302ab11f6b68bbd283c.png)

> [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/QDSYsQzrj2) to report bugs, suggest mods or features, or to simply chat.

Why do certain ores drop experience while others don't? That question will likely remain unanswered, but this mod implements mechanics that solve this problem: all ores drop experience points!

This mod is **configurable**, meaning data pack and modpack creators can easily add other blocks that drop experience. The original vanilla file can be edited and added onto, or a whole new file can be made in the same directory to keep it organised.

# 💰 Content
By default, the mod provides support for:
- (Deepslate) Copper Ore
- (Deepslate) Iron Ore
- (Deepslate) Gold Ore
- Ancient Debris
